## beehiiv segments recalculate

Recalculate a segment

### Synopsis

Recalculate segment

Recalculates a specific segment belonging to a publication

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/segments/{segmentId}/recalculate

```
beehiiv segments recalculate <segmentId> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv segments recalculate segment_123
beehiiv segments refresh segment_123
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                help for recalculate
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
